category_sources: source_facts.description says it verifies provenance from SLSA compliant builders; official README describes verification of SLSA provenance and the SLSA security framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is slsa-verifier; official GitHub repository and README use slsa-verifier.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and docs directory provide installation, options, and verification workflows for artifacts, containers, npm packages, and attestations.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/slsa-framework/slsa-verifier; returned null per instruction not to second-guess populated repos.
